summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CLS Customers data migration (1,047 records with customer_name and ship_to_name). All 8 features tested and passing. CLS Customers display correctly as blue clustered dots with proper popup showing Ship To Name (bold), Customer Name, 'CLS Customers' label, and City/State. Win Zones with Wheat market shows Kansas as #2. All Market Views working correctly.
passed_tests: CLS Customers layer shows 1,047 points on the map when toggled ON (via Advanced Data Layers) - PASS
CLS Customers appear as blue clustered dots with proper clustering behavior (zoom in to uncluster) - PASS

Clicking an unclustered CLS Customer point shows popup with: Ship To Name (bold), Customer Name (if different), 'CLS Customers' label, and City/State - PASS (tested with VAN DIEST SUPPLY CO ABILENE KS)
Layer Stats show '1,047 CLS Customers' when CLS is the only active layer - PASS
Wheat market view with Win Zones ON shows Kansas as #2 (Central Kansas - 75 counties, 19% of market, 96% coverage) - PASS
Win Zones still function correctly with CLS data now in location_points instead of point_data - PASS
CLS Customers radius circle toggle works in advanced layers (25mi, 50mi, 100mi options) - PASS
All Market Views (Rice, Wheat, Corn, Hogs, Pest Control) still work correctly - PASS
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in frontend/.env
seed_data_creation: CLS Customers data already loaded (1,047 records with customer_name and ship_to_name fields)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CLS Customers data successfully migrated from aggregated point_data (57 city records) to individual location_points (1,047 records). Each record has customer_name and ship_to_name fields. CLS Customers render through locationGeoJSON with Mapbox clustering. Popup shows Ship To Name in bold, Customer Name below if different, 'CLS Customers' label, and City/State. Key data-testids: layer-toggle-CLS Customers, radius-toggle-CLS Customers, radius-miles-CLS Customers-{25|50|100}, stat-CLS Customers, market-{rice|wheat|corn|hogs|pest}, win-zones-toggle, win-zone-cards, win-zone-card-{0-4}.

cls_customers_count.details: Layer Stats shows '1,047 CLS Customers' when CLS layer is active

cls_customers_clustering.details: CLS Customers display as blue clustered dots (dark circles with numbers) that uncluster when zooming in

cls_customers_popup.details: Popup shows: Ship To Name (bold) 'VAN DIEST SUPPLY CO ABILENE KS', Customer Name 'VAN DIEST SUPPLY CO', Layer 'CLS Customers', Location 'Abilene, Kansas'

kansas_in_top_zones.details: Central Kansas is #2 in Top Market Zones for Wheat (75 counties, 19% of market, 96% coverage)

win_zones_with_location_points.details: Win Zones calculate correctly using CLS data from location_points (WinZoneCards.js checks both pointData and locationData)

cls_radius_toggle.details: Radius toggle visible and functional with 25mi, 50mi, 100mi options. Circles display correctly around CLS Customer points

market_views.details: All 5 market views work correctly: Rice (2,110 growers, 2.3M acres), Wheat (25,704 growers, 37M+ acres), Corn (48,546 growers, 80M+ acres), Hogs (62M+ hogs, 665 manufacturers), Pest Control (263,164 farms, 23,737 pest control)
